summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sam's Phones & Tobacco website - frontend-only static marketing site with all major functionality working correctly

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile menu toggle button not visible at expected breakpoints (tested down to 375px)
ui_bugs.details: CSS breakpoint configuration issue - mobile menu toggle has 'md:hidden' class but doesn't become visible below 768px. Navigation code structure is correct.

passed_tests: Home page loads with hero section, tagline, and store photos
Services section displays all 4 service categories
Gallery section with store photos loads correctly
Products & Services page content - all sections (prepaid, repairs, buy/sell, other products)
Store Policies page - no refund policy and 30-day pickup rule displayed
Contact page - Google Map embed, phone, address, store hours
Contact form functionality - form submission and success message
Contact form 'Send Another Message' button works
Desktop navigation between all 4 pages works correctly
Get Directions buttons (Google Maps links) work correctly
Hero section call and directions buttons function properly
View All Services button navigates to Products page
Google Reviews link points to correct Google Maps URL
Business tagline and 5-star rating display correctly
Store address and contact information displayed properly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix mobile navigation CSS breakpoint issue - mobile menu toggle should be visible below 768px breakpoint. The toggle button has correct functionality but visibility classes need adjustment.
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (3/3 endpoints working), Frontend: 95% (18/19 features working, 1 CSS issue)
